title: oreophilus octocornutus
intro: Oreophilus octocornutus, also known as the eight-angled figwort, is a plant species native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Africa and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Oreophilus octocornutus include its potential to treat various health issues such as fever, digestive problems, and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
